task_completion.description: Open the Sentinel-2 image in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SNAP application (or similar GIS software) is open with 'sentinel2_tci.tif' loaded in the Product Explorer or displayed in the main image view.

task_completion.description: Create a vector data container named 'field_boundaries'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vector data node or folder named 'field_boundaries' is visible in the Product Explorer under the loaded image.

task_completion.description: Draw at least two distinct polygons representing fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two distinct polygons are drawn over the satellite image in the main view.
A band named 'masked_field_data' is visible in the Bands folder of the Product Explorer.

task_completion.description: Save the enriched product as a BEAM-DIMAP file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, a saved product path in the Product Explorer, or a file manager/terminal showing 'field_extraction.dim' in '/home/ga/snap_projects/'.

task_completion.description: Export the vector geometries as an ESRI Shapefile
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file manager/terminal showing 'fields.shp' in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

task_completion.description: Export the final masked product as a GeoTIFF
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file manager/terminal showing 'field_extraction.tif' in '/home/ga/snap_exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to process the image and create outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP application window is visible with the image loaded and tools being used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The polygons are drawn over actual agricultural fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Polygons enclose areas that look like agricultural fields on the satellite image, not just random shapes on a blank screen.

integrity.description: The output files were not mocked using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' creating empty files with the target names; presence of application save/export dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. The vector container must be named 'field_boundaries' and contain at least 2 polygons. The masked band must be named 'masked_field_data'. The expected outputs are a BEAM-DIMAP file at /home/ga/snap_projects/field_extraction.dim, a shapefile at /home/ga/snap_exports/fields.shp, and a GeoTIFF at /home/ga/snap_exports/field_extraction.tif.
